reviews.review_description: I like these games.  I want a miner tycoon also.  VR doesn't add anything but it is nice to see close up.  Just something chill to turn your brain off for a while.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback and support. We’re glad to hear you’re enjoying the relaxing gameplay experience. A miner tycoon theme is a great suggestion, and we’ll keep it in mind for future projects. We also appreciate your thoughts on the VR experience and are happy to know you enjoyed the close-up interaction. Thanks again for playing our game!

reviews.review_description: This is a really chill and fun game , I hope that there's an update where we can turn the camera.

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for your kind feedback! We’re really happy to hear that you’re enjoying the game and finding it fun and relaxing. 😊
We also appreciate your suggestion about adding camera control — that’s a great idea, and we’ll definitely consider it for future updates. Stay tuned for more improvements and content!
